title: Grilled Asparagus
description: Simply grilled asparagus with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Finished with lemon zest and optional parmesan. Fast, reliable, works alongside almost anything.

instructions.text: Snap woody ends off asparagus by bending each stalk until it breaks naturally. Toss with oil, salt, and pepper.
Place asparagus on grill grates over direct medium-high heat. Grill 5–8 minutes, rolling once or twice for even char.
Optional: in the last 60–90 seconds, brush lightly with Bachan's for a savory-sweet finish. Pull when slightly charred and just tender with a little bite remaining.
Plate immediately. Finish with lemon zest and shaved parmesan while hot.

notes:
Don't overcook -- asparagus should have a little bite remaining. It continues to soften slightly off the grill.

For oven roasting instead: 425°F for 10–12 minutes, single layer on a sheet pan.
